title: オグリは森の案内ウマ娘？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back from training, Oguri Cap and I
spot Tamamo Cross consoling a crying child.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Leave this to me! No matter how many doggies
are missin', I'll find 'em in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The child tells Oguri Cap about how Tamamo
Cross has gone in search of his missing dog that
ran off into the forest.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...It's almost dark. And dark forests can be
dangerous. I'll go and help.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That would be great. Come on, let's hurry.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I found some footprints. Fresh ones. They're
probably Tama's, so let's follow them.
choice_data_list: We need to mark where we've been.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: There's no need. The trees can guide us back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap marches on without hesitation. I
anxiously follow, making sure not to get
separated. And then...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Drat... I found the pup, but I got no clue where
the heck I am now. At this rate, the search party's
gonna come lookin' for me too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And anyone that hears 'em yelling, "Here, puppy!
Here, Tama!" is gonna assume I'm a cat!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
They'll be tellin' me to meow, but I'm an
Umamusume, not a cat!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sounds like you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! O-Oguri? You two can't just sneak up on
people like dat! Say somethin' first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dog is sitting by Tamamo Cross's feet. We
explain that we heard about the situation and
came to help.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So now we're all lost, huh? That's my bad.
choice_data_list: Actually, Oguri Cap knows the way...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That don't sound promisin'. Oguri gets lost all the
time just around town. Heck, even at the
academy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ah well. I needa figure this out for myself. This
pup's super friendly, but it's not like he can lead
the way back.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I've got it. This way!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You gotta be kiddin' me! With you leadin' the way, we're gonna end up even more lost!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the trees, the shrubbery, and the way
the soil feels underfoot, this is definitely the path
we took earlier. Follow me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's too dark to see our footprints, but... I
recognize this tree trunk from earlier. Next, we
have to turn this way.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Look at you, bein' all reliable and stuff!
Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: R-really? Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. It's fine, I can handle this. I'll show you
the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap seems extremely confident, so we
decide to follow her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To my surprise, we find ourselves back at the
forest entrance.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: We made it! I gotta say, I'm impressed, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The trees and plants are different shapes...
depending on where you are. And the ground
feels different too. Far easier to navigate than a
town.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're our hero, Oguri! You're really somethin'
when ya put your mind to it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...It really wasn't anything special.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya don't gotta be so modest! You were a total
lifesaver! Thanks a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Did I really help everyone out? ...That's a first, I
think.
choice_data_list: I'll be counting on you from here on out.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Do you really mean that? And here I thought it
was me who always needed help...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But that's nice to hear from you. It's good
knowing that I've returned the favor.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I really do wanna give back to everyone
who's supported me, so let me know if there's
ever anything I can do!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Counting on... me?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'm more dependable than I realized... I
always thought racing was the only way I could
make people happy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Well, in that case, feel free to ask me for help
at any time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You betcha! I look forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Anyhoo, let's get this pup back home! His house is
near the station, so from here...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's this way.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, where d'ya think you're goin'? That's the
wrong way!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: O-oh. I guess it's this way, then.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's the total opposite direction! How come ya
can find your way out of a forest, but can't find
your way down the street?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, the dog is safely returned home—with
Tamamo Cross leading the way.
